scripts.wasm: RUSTFLAGS='-C target-feature=+simd128' wasm-pack build crates/alchemy-core --target web --out-dir ../../web/src/wasm --release -- --features wasm && node scripts/check-wasm-boundaries.mjs
scripts.predev: npm run assets && npm run libraw-wasm && npm run wasm
scripts.build: npm run assets && npm run libraw-wasm && npm run wasm && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && cargo build --quiet --release -p alchemy-cli && node scripts/check-libraw-parity.mjs && playwright test
scripts.test:pages: npm run build:pages && VITE_BASE_PATH=/lut/ playwright test --config playwright.pages.config.ts
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run build && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
